name: fleet-refresh-0-21-0
title: Roll out SD pack 0.21.4 to the consumer fleet
description: Sequentially refresh every stale consumer in docs/fleet/consumers.json to sd-ai-command-pack 0.21.4. The original 0.21.0 rollout was superseded by corrective releases for UTF-8, chmod portability, status path validation, and read-only helper imports.
creator: sdelmas
notes: All seven consumers reached 0.21.4 through merged, audited PRs. Final fleet preflight reported seven at-target rows and no stale consumers.
